text.title: Micro-MVP Cut Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the day-sized slice spec. Subagent must satisfy this before slice enters SDD task queue.

field.name: ui_polish_explicit_minimum
field.constraint: contains 'default styles', 'no animation', 'no responsive polish' OR explicit minimum description

forbidden.pattern: cut_per_axis missing any of the 6 axis keys (violates r1)
deferral_list empty OR deferrals with reason == "later" / "TBD" (violates r3)
smoke_test_cases length > 2 OR includes integration / e2e tests (violates r4)
ui_polish_explicit_minimum mentions animations, transitions, dark mode, responsive design (violates r5)
planned_ship_date != today (slice should ship same day; non-today indicates the cut failed)
user_outcome contains multiple verbs ("user can do X AND Y") — that's 2 slices

allowed-transformations.transformation: Mark an axis as "N/A" with explicit reason when it genuinely doesn't apply (e.g., no permission model in single-user app).
Extend ceiling to 12 hours only when slice cannot decompose further AND operator declares; track in retro.
Pre-promote a deferred item to next-slice queue immediately if it would benefit user validation.

list.item: All 6 cut axes have minimum + deferred entries
UI polish explicit minimum is raw
User outcome is a single verb (one slice)
